rulings.Case Title: THOMAS LEO DOUGLAS TREMBLAY VS. ADERHOLT SPECIALTY COMPANY INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel San Francisco Gravel Company, Inc.S Further Responses To Propounded Request For Admissions, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, August 19, 2014 in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiffs' motion to compel San Francisco Gravel Company, Inc.'s further responses to propounded request for admissions, special interrogatories and request for production of documents and request for monetary sanctions is continued to September 3, 2014 per agreement of the parties. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS LEO DOUGLAS TREMBLAY VS. ADERHOLT SPECIALTY COMPANY INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel J.S. Guerin Company, Inc.S Further Responses To Propounded Request For Admissions, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, August 19, 2014 in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiffs' motion to compel J.S. Guerin & Company, Inc.'s further responses to propounded request for admissions, special interrogatories and request for production of documents and request for monetary sanctions is continued to September 3, 2014 per agreement of the parties. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: HAROLD KOEPKE et al VS. FORD MOTOR COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Verified Proper Responses To Requests For Admission, Set Two, And Set Two Form Interrogatory No. 17.1
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, August 19, 2014 in Department 503, Line 2. Defendant Volkswagen Group of America, Inc.'s motion to compel verified responses to requests for admission, set two, and set two form interrogatory no. 17.1 is off calendar as moot. Plaintiffs have withdrawn their request for monetary sanctions, the only issue remaining from the motion, and the parties have resolved. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: HAROLD KOEPKE et al VS. FORD MOTOR COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion For Protective Order To Preclude Deposition Of Its 85-Year Old Former President And For Monetary Sanctions; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, August 19, 2014 in Department 503, Line 2. Defendant Volkswagen Group of America, Inc.'s motion for protective order to preclude the deposition of its 85-year-old former president and for monetary sanctions is off calendar as moot. Plaintiffs have withdrawn their request for monetary sanctions, the only issue remaining from the motion, and the parties have resolved. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: HAROLD KOEPKE et al VS. FORD MOTOR COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Vwgoas Motion And Motion For Protective Order To Preclude Depositions Of Richard Bandstra, Thomas Zorn, And Further Deposition Of Defendant Volkswagen Group Of America On Irrelevant Topics
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, August 19, 2014 in Department 503, Line 2. Defendant Volkswagen Group of America, Inc.'s motion for protective order to preclude depositions of Richard Bandstra, Thomas Zorn, and further deposition of defendant Volkswagen Group of America on irrelevant topics is off calendar as moot. Plaintiffs have withdrawn their request for monetary sanctions, the only issue remaining from the motion, and the parties have resolved. = (503/TLJ)
